page_metadata.biotools__summary: This tutorial aims to illustrate the process of building up a command-line workflow using the BioExcel Building Blocks library (biobb). The tutorial is based on the Protein Gromacs MD Setup Jupyter Notebook tutorial.
page_metadata.bioschemas__name: BioExcel Building Blocks tutorials: Command-line workflows
